ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component's functionality */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer producing the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor, IC) */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet for detailed specifications */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., tVR, tSR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter's significance */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for the parameter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the component */,
  "value" REAL /* Specific value of the parameter for the component */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the parameter for the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design's purpose */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the design */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the design belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the design (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_components" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the design */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the design */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the component in the design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component (if applicable) */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter (if applicable) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_settings_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_designs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_designs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_designs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_designs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
